# @tuition/mobile — Mobile App + PWA

**Not yet scaffolded.** This tree is generated by the Expo CLI (it owns its own
`package.json`, `app.json`, etc.), so it's a separate step — do not hand-create it.

Generate it (from repo root) when starting M3:

```bash
cd apps && pnpm create expo-app mobile --template
cd mobile
npx expo install expo-router expo-camera expo-sqlite expo-notifications \
  expo-secure-store react-native-nfc-manager
pnpm add @tanstack/react-query zustand zod @tuition/shared
```

Stack: Expo SDK 54 (RN), Expo Router v4, React Native Web (PWA), TanStack Query,
expo-sqlite (offline check-in queue), expo-camera (QR), NFC. See SRS §11.7 and §10
(offline & sync design) for the door check-in flow.
